title: dhslab/dragenflow pipeline parameters
description: Nextflow pipeline for running DRAGEN alignment and variant calling workflows (germline, somatic, RNA-seq, methylation).

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to samplesheet CSV file. Supports reads (read1/read2), BAM/CRAM, fastq_list, demux_path, or samplemap columns. See README for format details.

outdir.description: Output directory where results will be saved. Use absolute paths for cloud infrastructure.

demux_outdir.description: Directory containing demultiplexed FASTQ output (with Reports/fastq_list.csv). Used when providing pre-demuxed data.

tracedir.description: Directory for pipeline execution trace files.

email.description: Email address for pipeline completion summary.

multiqc_title.description: MultiQC report title. Used as page header and filename prefix.

workflow_options.title: Workflow options
workflow_options.description: Select the analysis mode and control core pipeline behavior.

workflow.description: Analysis workflow mode. Typically set by the analysis profile rather than on the command line.

run_dragen.description: Execute the DRAGEN alignment step. Set to false to skip DRAGEN (e.g., for testing samplesheet parsing).

extra_dragen_args.description: Additional raw arguments appended to the DRAGEN command line. Useful for one-off flags not covered by parameters.

dragen_alignment_options.title: DRAGEN alignment options
dragen_alignment_options.description: Options controlling DRAGEN alignment behavior and reference files.

refdir.description: Path to the DRAGEN hash-table reference directory.

methylation_refdir.description: Path to the DRAGEN bisulfite/methylation hash-table reference directory. Set automatically by the bsseq profile.

fasta.description: Path to the genome FASTA reference. Used for CRAM decoding and downstream annotation.

cram_reference.description: FASTA reference used when reading input CRAM files.

dbsnp.description: dbSNP VCF for variant annotation. Used when Nirvana annotation is disabled.

intermediate_dir.description: DRAGEN intermediate results directory. Paths beginning with /staging are treated as on-DRAGEN-hardware paths.

adapter1.description: FASTA file of adapter sequences for read 1. Defaults to bundled DRAGEN adapter sequences.

adapter2.description: FASTA file of adapter sequences for read 2. Defaults to bundled DRAGEN adapter sequences.

mark_duplicates.description: Enable DRAGEN duplicate marking. Set to false when using UMI-based deduplication.

pangenome_reference.description: Validate pangenome reference. Enable when using a pangenome DRAGEN reference.

target_bedfile.description: Target BED file for exome or panel sequencing. Enables exome-mode SV and CNV calling and restricts variant calling to targeted regions.

dragen_variant_calling_options.title: DRAGEN variant calling options
dragen_variant_calling_options.description: Options for SNV, SV, and CNV variant calling.

cnv_caller.description: Enable DRAGEN copy number variant (CNV) caller.

hotspot_vcf.description: VCF of somatic hotspot positions passed to --vc-somatic-hotspots.

hotspot_bed.description: BED file used to generate a hotspot VCF on the fly (alternative to --hotspot_vcf).

snv_noisefile.description: Systematic noise BED file for SNV filtering (--vc-systematic-noise).

sv_noisefile.description: Systematic noise BEDPE file for SV filtering (--sv-systematic-noise).

cnv_population_vcf.description: Population B-allele frequency VCF for CNV calling (--cnv-population-b-allele-vcf). Required for tumor-only CNV calling.

dragen_tandem_dup_hotspots.description: BED file of somatic insertion/tandem duplication hotspot regions (--sv-somatic-ins-tandup-hotspot-regions-bed).

dragen_cnv_filter_length.description: Minimum CNV length (bp) to report (--cnv-filter-length). Recommended: 500000 for tumor-only WGS.

dragen_cnv_merge_distance.description: Maximum distance (bp) between adjacent CNV segments to merge (--cnv-merge-distance). Recommended: 2000000 for tumor-only WGS.

sv_annotation_distance.description: Maximum distance (bp) for SV breakend annotation matching. Used in downstream SV annotation.

max_filter_sv_length.description: Maximum SV length (bp) to retain in downstream annotation. SVs larger than this are filtered.

dux4caller.description: Enable DRAGEN DUX4 rearrangement caller (--enable-dux4-caller). For hematologic malignancies with potential DUX4-IGH fusions.

solid_tumor.description: Enable solid tumor UMI variant calling mode (--vc-enable-umi-solid).

liquid_tumor.description: Enable liquid tumor UMI variant calling mode (--vc-enable-umi-liquid). For hematologic malignancies.

dragen_umi_options.title: DRAGEN UMI options
dragen_umi_options.description: Options for UMI-based library processing and deduplication.

umi.description: UMI library type passed to --umi-library-type. Set to 'random-simplex' for IDT UDI-UMI libraries. When set, duplicate marking is typically disabled and adapters are trimmed with fastp before DRAGEN.

readfamilysize.description: Minimum number of reads in a UMI family to support a variant (--umi-min-supporting-reads).

dragen_rna_options.title: DRAGEN RNA-seq options
dragen_rna_options.description: Options specific to the RNA-seq workflow (workflow=rna).

annotation_gtf.description: Gene annotation GTF file for RNA-seq alignment and quantification (-a). Must be gzip-compressed and sorted.

transcript_table.description: Transcript-to-gene mapping table used to annotate DRAGEN quantification output with gene names.

downsample_rna.description: Downsample RNA-seq reads to this many reads (--enable-down-sampler / --down-sampler-reads). Useful for large samples.

annotation_options.title: Variant annotation options
annotation_options.description: Options for VEP and Nirvana variant annotation.

vepcache.description: Path to the VEP cache directory used for SNV, SV, and CNV annotation.

cytobands.description: Cytogenetic band BED file (gzip-compressed) for SV and CNV annotation. Defaults to bundled hg38 cytobands.

use_nirvana.description: Use Nirvana for in-DRAGEN variant annotation instead of dbSNP-only annotation. Requires --nirvana_path.

nirvana_path.description: Path to the Nirvana annotation data directory (--variant-annotation-data).

compute_options.title: Compute cluster options
compute_options.description: Options for WashU RIS compute cluster job submission.

user_group.description: LSF user group for compute1 job submission (-G flag).

queue.description: LSF queue name for compute1 job submission (-q flag).

job_group_name.description: LSF job group name for compute1 job scheduling (-g flag). e.g. /dspencer/nextflow

slurm_partition.description: SLURM partition for compute2 job submission.

singularity_cache.description: Directory for caching Singularity images on compute2.

local_dragen_container.description: Docker image name for on-premise DRAGEN jobs.

aws_dragen_container.description: AWS Batch job definition ARN or name for DRAGEN jobs on AWS. e.g. job-definition://dragen_v4-4-6

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: iGenomes reference options (not used by default).

genome.description: iGenomes reference name. Not used by this pipeline (igenomes_ignore=true by default).

igenomes_base.description: Base URL for iGenomes reference files.

igenomes_ignore.description: Do not load iGenomes reference config.

institutional_config_options.title: Institutional config options
institutional_config_options.description: Parameters used to describe centralised config profiles. These should not be edited.
institutional_config_options.help_text: The centralised nf-core configuration profiles use a handful of pipeline parameters to describe themselves. This information is then printed to the Nextflow log when you run a pipeline. You should not need to change these values when you run a pipeline.

custom_config_version.description: Git commit id for Institutional configs.

max_job_request_options.title: Max job request options
max_job_request_options.description: Set the top limit for requested resources for any single job.
max_job_request_options.help_text: If you are running on a smaller system, a pipeline step requesting more resources than are available may cause the Nextflow to stop the run with an error. These options allow you to cap the maximum resources requested by any single job so that the pipeline will run on your system.

max_cpus.description: Maximum number of CPUs that can be requested for any single job.

max_memory.description: Maximum amount of memory that can be requested for any single job.

max_time.description: Maximum amount of time that can be requested for any single job.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline, typically set in a config file.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to save pipeline results to output directory.

email_on_fail.description: Email address for completion summary, only when pipeline fails.

plaintext_email.description: Send plain-text email instead of HTML.

max_multiqc_email_size.description: File size limit when attaching MultiQC reports to summary emails.

monochrome_logs.description: Do not use coloured log outputs.

hook_url.description: Incoming hook URL for MS Teams or Slack notifications.

multiqc_config.description: Custom config file to supply to MultiQC.

multiqc_logo.description: Custom logo file to supply to MultiQC. File name must also be set in the MultiQC config file.

multiqc_methods_description.description: Custom MultiQC YAML file containing HTML methods description.

validate_params.description: Validate parameters against the schema at runtime.

validationShowHiddenParams.description: Show all params when using --help, including hidden parameters.

validationFailUnrecognisedParams.description: Fail validation if an unrecognised parameter is found.

validationLenientMode.description: Allow string values parseable as numbers or booleans during validation.

validationSchemaIgnoreParams.description: Comma-separated list of parameter names to ignore during schema validation.
